UnitedHealthcare.title: UnitedHealthcare Prior Authorization Policy
UnitedHealthcare.summary: This policy outlines the prior authorization requirements and guidelines for UnitedHealthcare members. This policy applies to codes: 27447, 70553, 74177. Compliance with these rules is mandatory for claim reimbursement.
UnitedHealthcare.medical_necessity_criteria: Criteria for prior authorization must meet UnitedHealthcare's clinical evidence standards.
